meta.methodology: Two segments: (1) 500 charities from Charity Commission open data and curated regional research; (2) 500 SMBs/non-charities across 17 sectors with admin-burden and AI-adoption intelligence for meeting prep. Regions: Norfolk, Suffolk, Cambridgeshire (primary), Greater Manchester (secondary). SMB scoring weights automation/AI training fit, sector admin pressure, and notes where VA alone is not the right entry. Research date 23 Jun 2026.
